description: The global site header containing the institution logo and primary mega-navigation, rendered as a banner landmark.

props.name: navItems
props.type: Array<{ label: string; href?: string; children?: Array<{ label: string; href?: string; children?: Array<{ label: string; href: string; title?: string }> }> }>

stories.name: Default
stories.description: Standard University of Sheffield site header with default crest logo and navigation

stories.name: SubsiteLogo
stories.description: Site header with a custom subsite logo, as used on the Management School pages

props.logoAlt: University of Sheffield Management School homepage

notes: The site-header always contains exactly two structural children: a .logo block (with a linked responsive picture element) and a .meganav block (containing the MegaNav organism via Drupal's region/block system). The MegaNav organism is already built; its navItems prop mirrors the navigation tree rendered in the block-uos-globalnav nav element. The .logo div gains the additional class 'mgmt-logo' on Management School sub-site pages. The source element within picture is only present in the standard (non-mgmt) logo variant and provides a desktop-resolution srcset. The aria-label 'Site header' and role='banner' are hardcoded as they are invariant across all samples.
